回上一頁	國立金門大學	 
 	教學綱要	 

部別 : 日間部學士班	113學年度第1學期	列印日期 : 2026/05/24
科目名稱 : 觀光英文 (English for Tourism)	開課班級 : 應英二年級	學　　分 : 2.0	授課時數 : 2.0
授課教師 : 周晏安	必選修 : 選修	 	 


1.教學目標
After the class, students will be able to : 1. retirve from some of the reading, listening and vocabulary tasks 2. improve their speaking and writing tasks are too practical in nature 3. In reality learn the skills for writing a cover letter and C.V., preparing for a job interview, responding to complaints, giving a professional presentation, and negotiating. 


2.教學綱要
was selected due to the absence of EFL texts for Sport or Event Management, and because most recent EFL books for the tourism industry are designed for working professionals, rather than first-year, multilingual university students. The Oxford Tourism series is likewise intended for professional purposes, but the third book turns from interactions with customers to concepts and issues of tourism management. Each unit builds upon native-like texts and audio recordings featuring managers and educators in the field. The reading and listening activities proceed from comprehension checks to pair and group discussions, and are interspersed with contextualized information gaps, vocabulary building, inductive reviews of linguistic features, pronunciation tasks, speaking tasks and writing assignments that can be completed in class or as homework. 


3.教科書
1	書名 : 自編教材　
出版日期 : 年 月 
作者 : 　出版社 : 　版本 :

6.成績評定及課堂要求
Quizzes, in-class bi-weekly participation, homework/podcast 25% Midterm: 25% Final exam: 25% Attendance: 25% 
1. Self-respect at all aspects. 2. No any smart phone allowed. 3. Absence or any late work will not be graded unless you’ve made prior arrangements with the professor.  
Week1: please join for registrater teacher-made handouts and books Extra credit of the blue-card for early birds or active learners with volunteering attitudes 


8.永續發展目標(SDGs)：SDG4 優質教育、SDG8 合適的工作及經濟成長


9.大學社會責任(USR)關聯性：高
